text: <script>,,            // Scroll behavior,            window.addEventListener(,                "scroll",,                () => {,                    const nav = document.querySelector(".aether-nav");,                    if (window.scrollY > 50) {,                        nav.classList.add("aether-nav--scrolled");,                    } else {,                        nav.classList.remove("aether-nav--scrolled");,                    },                },,                { passive: true },,            );,,            // Menu Toggle behavior,            const menuToggle = document.getElementById("aether-menu-toggle");,            const navLinks = document.querySelector(".aether-nav-links");,,            if (menuToggle && navLinks) {,                menuToggle.addEventListener("click", () => {,                    navLinks.classList.toggle("aether-nav-links--open");,                    menuToggle.classList.toggle("aether-hamburger--active");,,                    // Prevent body scroll when menu is open,                    if (navLinks.classList.contains("aether-nav-links--open")) {,                        document.body.style.overflow = "hidden";,                    } else {,                        document.body.style.overflow = "";,                    },                });,,                // Close menu when a link is clicked,                navLinks.querySelectorAll("a").forEach((link) => {,                    link.addEventListener("click", () => {,                        navLinks.classList.remove("aether-nav-links--open");,                        menuToggle.classList.remove("aether-hamburger--active");,                        document.body.style.overflow = "";,                    });,                });,            },        ,</script>
